name: pionless-agent
description: Cross-platform research agent package. Codex ships shared research skills through the plugin and installs matching custom-agent templates separately under ~/.codex/agents.

interface.shortDescription: Research agents: quick, deep, and pro
interface.longDescription: A research-agent package centered on named orchestrators and worker agents. The Codex plugin distributes reusable skills and MCP config; the installer also lays down matching custom-agent files under ~/.codex/agents so deep-research and deep-research-pro can fan out to workers.
defaultPrompt: Use the deep-research agent to investigate a topic and delegate worker agents.
Use the deep-research-pro agent for an exhaustive investigation with verification workers.
Use the quick-research agent for a fast, single-agent sourced answer.
